programme.title: Salaam Venky
programme.desc: Sujata, an ideal mother, who battled the most challenging situations one can ever face with a smile.

programme.title: Army
programme.desc: Newly-wed Arjun, an army man, is brutally killed by Naagraj, a gangster. His wife, Geeta, determined to avenge her husband, raises an army of dedicated young men to kill Naagraj.

programme.title: Ek Vivaah... Aisa Bhi
programme.desc: A middle class girl, who lives with her family, falls in love with a rich boy. On the day of her engagement her father dies. In order to take care of her siblings, she must sacrifice her love.

programme.title: Saheb Biwi Aur Gangster 3
programme.desc: Aditya returns from jail and tries to reclaim his political legacy. On meeting London-based gangster Uday, the war for the survival of the richest and the shrewdest begins.

programme.title: Behen Hogi Teri
programme.desc: Neighbours Gattu and Binniy are in love. But according to their localty, girls from the neighbourhood are to be considered sisters. How will their love story hold up?

programme.title: Fitoor
programme.desc: Modern adaptation of Charles Dickens' Great Expectations; a poor but talented boy falls in love with a girl from an affluent family.

programme.title: Daddy
programme.desc: Arun Gawli, a young man, is forced to turn to crime for making a livelihood. However, what starts with a simple 'matka' gambling ring, soon turns into a full-fledged criminal network.

programme.title: Batti Gul Meter Chalu
programme.desc: The life of three friends takes a tragic turn due to an inflated electricity bill, which leads to a courtroom drama and social awakening.

programme.title: Saheb Biwi Aur Gangster 3
programme.desc: Aditya returns from jail and tries to reclaim his political legacy. On meeting London-based gangster Uday, the war for the survival of the richest and the shrewdest begins.

programme.title: Behen Hogi Teri
programme.desc: Neighbours Gattu and Binniy are in love. But according to their localty, girls from the neighbourhood are to be considered sisters. How will their love story hold up?

programme.title: Fitoor
programme.desc: Modern adaptation of Charles Dickens' Great Expectations; a poor but talented boy falls in love with a girl from an affluent family.

programme.title: Daddy
programme.desc: Arun Gawli, a young man, is forced to turn to crime for making a livelihood. However, what starts with a simple 'matka' gambling ring, soon turns into a full-fledged criminal network.

programme.title: Batti Gul Meter Chalu
programme.desc: The life of three friends takes a tragic turn due to an inflated electricity bill, which leads to a courtroom drama and social awakening.

programme.title: Baaghi: Rebels in Love
programme.desc: A martial artist faces his biggest test when he has to travel to Bangkok to rescue the woman he loves from the clutches of his romantic rival.

programme.title: Wedding Pullav
programme.desc: Karan and Anushka are best friends. When Karan marries Riya, Anushka is going to marry Jay. Do fate and love have a twist in store for them?

programme.title: Badla
programme.desc: When a woman is accused of killing her lover, a renowned lawyer is hired -- but the more they try to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Bioscopewala
programme.desc: A woman meets her late dad's friend, who ran the Bioscope show she loved as a kid. Love and cinema connect India and Afghanistan in this story.

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Helicopter Eela
programme.desc: Eela Raiturkar, an aspiring singer, gives up on her career after her husband abandons her and their son, Vivaan. However, years later, he encourages his mother to pursue her dream.

programme.title: Hum Tum Shabana
programme.desc: Rishi and Karthik fall head over heels for Shabana, a participant in a beauty pageant. However, they are soon horrified to find out that her uncle is a dreaded gangster.

programme.title: Gurgaon
programme.desc: Preet, the daughter of a real estate tycoon, is abducted by her own brother, Nikki. As her family tries to track her whereabouts, many secrets unravel and things take a nasty turn for them all.

programme.title: Kaabil
programme.desc: Rohan, a visually impaired man, marries Supriya, the love of his life. Their happiness is tarnished when Supriya commits suicide after being raped by influential bandits.

programme.title: The Zoya Factor
programme.desc: Zoya, who becomes the lucky charm of the Indian cricket team, is forced to choose between her career as a mascot or Nikhil, the love of her life and the captain of the Indian team.

programme.title: Satta
programme.desc: Anuradha relocates to Mumbai and marries Vivek, an aspiring politician. However, complications arise when he is arrested for murder and she has to take his place in the upcoming elections.

programme.title: India's Most Wanted
programme.desc: As a nod to the proverb fortune favours the brave, a ragtag team of heroes takes it upon themselves to apprehend one of India's most dreaded enemies.

programme.title: Ugly Aur Pagli
programme.desc: Kabir's life takes a turn when he meets a quirky girl, Kuhu. However, what he fails to realise is that she is fighting boredom by trying to transform him into her obnoxious equal.

programme.title: Mohenjo Daro
programme.desc: Sarman, a poor farmer, arrives in Mohenjo Daro, a city ruled by the tyrant Maham. He learns about the history that his family shares with Maham and devises a plan to take revenge on him.

programme.title: Hate Story 3
programme.desc: Aditya Dewan, a successful businessman, faces a dilemma upon the arrival of Saurav which disrupts his life as revenge comes knocking at his door.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Venom
वेनोम
வெனோம்
वेनम
programme.desc: A group of friends find themselves running for their very lives from Ray Sawyer, a reanimated corpse possessed by 13 evil souls, who has vicious plans for them.
13 தீய ஆன்மாக்களால் புத்துயிர் பெற்ற பிணமான ரே சாயரிடமிருந்து ஒரு நண்பர்கள் குழு தங்கள் உயிரைக் காப்பாற்றிக் கொள்கிறது.

programme.title: Batla House
बाटला हाउज
பாட்லா ஹவுஸ்
బట్ల హౌస్
बाटला हाऊस
programme.desc: A police inspector and his team engage in a violent encounter with suspected terrorists. However, the deadly shootout receives nationwide criticism questioning its legitimacy.
एक पुलिस इंस्पेक्टर और उसकी टीम, संदिग्ध आतंकवादियों के साथ हिंसक मुठभेड़ में शामिल हो जाती है। हालाँकि, घातक गोलीबारी, देश भर में आलोचना फैलाती है और इसकी वैधता पर सवाल उठते हैं।

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: The Manchester Originals' bowlers will have their work cut out for them against London Spirit who will be looking to David Warner for an explosive start.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: Northern Superchargers travel to take on Trent Rockets and Marcus Stoinis's bowling attack.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Ashleigh Gardner and Alana King test Annabel Sutherland in Nottingham as Rockets face Superchargers.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: Northern Superchargers travel to take on Trent Rockets and Marcus Stoinis's bowling attack.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Manchester Originals' bowlers will have their work cut out for them against London Spirit who will be looking to David Warner for an explosive start.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Beth Mooney and Sophie Ecclestone face London Spirit’s powerhouse Grace Harris in Manchester.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.title: Pre Game
programme.desc: Don't miss a moment of the Australia vs. South Africa series. The best team in cricket has all the highlights, previews, and analysis.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The game may be taking a break, but we're not. Keep watching for exclusive interviews, an analysis of team strategies, highlights, and more.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: Post Game
programme.desc: Join the Fox Cricket team for the best review from the day of cricket with this Post Game show.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Manchester Originals' bowlers will have their work cut out for them against London Spirit who will be looking to David Warner for an explosive start.

programme.title: Hundred W
programme.desc: Australian blockbuster takes center stage in Birmingham as Ellyse Perry's Phoenix go head-to-head with Meg Lanning's Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: The battle at Edgbaston will see the Birmingham Phoenix's Liam Livingstone go head-to-head with a tough Oval Invincibles side that includes Australian bowler Jason Behrendorff.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The battle at Edgbaston will see the Birmingham Phoenix's Liam Livingstone go head-to-head with a tough Oval Invincibles side that includes Australian bowler Jason Behrendorff.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Australian blockbuster takes center stage in Birmingham as Ellyse Perry's Phoenix go head-to-head with Meg Lanning's Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: Hundred W
programme.desc: Southern Brave with Sophie Devine, take on Annabel Sutherland's Superchargers at The Rose Bowl.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: Southern Brave's Utilita Bowl fortress will be put to the test by the Northern Superchargers.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M9 Hlts
programme.desc: A match from the 2025 Men's Hundred between Manchester Originals and London Spirit. (11.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M8 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Trent Rockets face Northern Superchargers at Trent Bridge. Superchargers captain Hollie Armitage hit 34* en route to a 47-run win over Welsh Fire previously. (10.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: A match from the 2025 Men's Hundred between Manchester Originals and London Spirit. Can the Originals turn their poor form around after two thrashings in a row?

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M7 Hlts
programme.desc: Out to go one better this season, 2024 Men's Hundred runners-up Southern Brave bid to add a second win in as many games, taking on Trent Boult and Birmingham Phoenix. (10.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M7 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Georgia Adams' Southern Brave - who got off to a winning start in their opening game - compete with Ellyse Perry's Birmingham Phoenix in Southampton. (10.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Manchester Originals compete with London Spirit. Both sides played out nail-biting thrillers over the weekend, winning their matches in the last ball.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M7 Hlts
programme.desc: Out to go one better this season, 2024 Men's Hundred runners-up Southern Brave bid to add a second win in as many games, taking on Trent Boult and Birmingham Phoenix. (10.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M5 Hlts
programme.desc: Back-to-back Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles are back in action at the Oval, as Rashid Khan and co take on Jimmy Anderson and the Manchester Originals. (09.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M6 Hlts
programme.desc: Steve Smith and Welsh Fire attempt to pick themselves up after defeat to the Superchargers, taking on David Warner and the London Spirit - who also faltered in their opener. (09.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: A match from the 2025 Men's Hundred between Manchester Originals and London Spirit. Can the Originals turn their poor form around after two thrashings in a row?

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M9 Hlts
programme.desc: A match from the 2025 Men's Hundred between Manchester Originals and London Spirit. (11.08)

programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Georgia Adams' Southern Brave - who got off to a winning start in their opening game - compete with Ellyse Perry's Birmingham Phoenix in Southampton. (10.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M8 Hlts
programme.desc: A match from the 2025 Men's Hundred between Trent Rockets and Northern Superchargers. England stars Zak Crawley and Harry Brook propelled the Superchargers to victory on Thursday. (10.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M8 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Trent Rockets face Northern Superchargers at Trent Bridge. Superchargers captain Hollie Armitage hit 34* en route to a 47-run win over Welsh Fire previously. (10.08)
